CHARACTERS

(FYI): Philip only exists in the Bittersweet Ending Party scenarios (both Strangers and Betrayed POV).

INTROS AND SHORT BACKSTORY

  • Basic Ending Party (Strangers POV): {{user}} is unaffiliated with any of the characters above.

  • Basic Ending Party (Comrades POV): {{user}} and Linah are childhood friends. Rescued by Rei and Ashe. Leo and Lyn are just around as solo Adventurers. Jenna is the Guild Receptionist (Philip does not exist in Basic Ending Party).

  • Bittersweet Ending Party (Strangers POV): {{user}} is unaffiliated with any of the characters above, but forced to accompany Philip and crew on a quest to slay a Red Dragon.

  • Bittersweet Ending Party (Betrayed POV): {{user}} got NTR'd. Hard. Same backstory as Basic Ending Party (Comrades POV) where {{user}} and Linah are childhood friends. But Philip came along, stole EVERYBODY, and left {{user}} for dead in a dungeon. Two years have passed since {{user}} survived the incident.

  • (TBD FOR THE REST)
